methods.native_decoder: Classic resonator plus native item-memory cleanup

methods.representation: Distributed sparse block codes (GSBC / block code factorizer)

methods.native_decoder: Exact or linear-system recovery under code/subcode assumptions
Exact tensor unbinding or enumeration oracle
Improved cleanup and decoding of fractional power encodings

tasks.name: Known-key cleanup
tasks.native_semantics: Role-aware item-memory retrieval after native unbinding.
notes: Nearest-neighbour cleanup is the native MAP baseline.
tasks.observation_contract: Known role or key with bundled role-filler pairs; unbind then cleanup.
tasks.output_contract: One filler per known role/key, plus detected miss if cleanup fails.

tasks.name: Blind single-product factorization
tasks.native_semantics: Native factorizer must return a factor tuple, not an arbitrary target picked post hoc.
notes: This is the direct descendant of the Level 1 single-product contract.
Candidate domains must be identical across paired methods within a trial.
tasks.observation_contract: All factors unknown; x = bind(f1, ..., fF).
tasks.output_contract: Exactly one prediction per factor domain.

tasks.name: Superposed tuple recovery
tasks.native_semantics: Methods must natively support tuple-set or histogram recovery to be ranked here.
notes: Semantic distractor superposition belongs here, not inside U1.
Methods that only return one tuple do not satisfy U2 without an explicit native set decoder.
tasks.output_contract: Tuple set or histogram recovery, not an evaluator-chosen target tuple.

tasks.name: Continuous-value cleanup
tasks.native_semantics: Report separately from discrete tuple recovery.
notes: Do not merge U3 into discrete U0/U1/U2 scoreboards.
FHRR-specific cleanup and decoding live here.
tasks.observation_contract: Continuous or phase-valued encodings such as FHRR/SSP.
tasks.output_contract: Recovered continuous value or cleanup candidate under the native algebra.

tasks.name: Nested structures
notes: No Level 3.0 benchmark cell may include U4.
tasks.observation_contract: Compositions containing nested bindings or recursively embedded structures.
tasks.output_contract: Structured tree or nested tuple recovery.

tasks.name: Open-set factor
tasks.native_semantics: Safety track only; not part of the primary substrate ranking.
notes: Do not fold open-set handling into core substrate ranking.
tasks.observation_contract: At least one factor may be absent from all known candidate domains.
tasks.output_contract: Recovered known factors plus detected unknown or abstention.
